Items.Title: Uzbeks to beat DR Congo? The reality of Scotland's qualification mental gymnastics
Items.Description: Uzbeks to beat DR Congo? Argentina to run riot? Favours from England? BBC Scotland weighs up the permutations needed for Scotland to progress.

Items.Title: Flawed but relentless Scotland show themselves as men of substance
Items.Description: Morocco threatened to blow Scotland away early on, but Steve Clarke's squad showed their resilience, writes Tom English.

Items.Title: 'Big decisions went against Scotland'
Items.Description: BBC Sport Scotland's Liam McLeod and James McFadden analyse the three key decisions that went against Scotland during their World Cup Group C 1-0 defeat against Morocco.
